message:
fix(storage): switch from :memory: to temp files, add schema debug logging

FrankenSQLite requires real file paths for WAL and schema operations.

Storage (sqlite.rs):
- open_memory() generates unique temp file paths via static AtomicUsize
  counter + PID (beads_mem_{pid}_{count}.db) instead of :memory:
- Remove conn.set_checkpoint_on_close(false) from open_with_timeout
- Add eprintln diagnostic if apply_schema fails in open_memory

Schema (schema.rs):
- Add eprintln debug logging to 5 error paths in apply_schema():
  execute_batch, run_pre_schema_migrations, run_migrations,
  PRAGMA user_version, apply_runtime_pragmas
- Switch 10 tests from Connection::open(":memory:") to
  Connection::open(tempfile::NamedTempFile) for WAL compatibility

CLI (defer.rs):
- Fix DirGuard ordering: move guard creation before commands::init
  so working directory is set during init execution

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
